oracle_source: not applicable: TradingView platform-blocked tick stream oracle
last_attempt_summary: Reviewed TradingView strategy/recalculate documentation: calc_on_every_tick applies to realtime updates only; tick data is lost on chart refresh; historical bars contain no tick data.
Reviewed Pine execution/bar-state documentation: strategies normally execute on bar close; calc_on_every_tick changes realtime update execution, not a historical deterministic tick feed.

Inspected committed Chromium/CDP TradingView capture fixtures: available payload contains main_bars, study_plots, visible_range_inputs, and sources; no tick/trade update stream or supplied tick export is present.
No TradingView UI/public API/CDP payload found that can inject PineLib supplied ticks or export the exact realtime tick sequence required for this oracle.
blocker: TradingView historical/CDP chart runtime exposes OHLC bars, Pine plots, and Strategy Tester reportData, but not a deterministic supplied synthetic tick stream. The case specifically requires ticks.csv and expected_report.json derived from the same TV tick stream, which cannot be obtained honestly.
hard_rule_note: No ticks.csv, bars.csv, or expected_report.json was fabricated from PineLib/local model output.
